title: El hombre que corría tras el viento
original_title: El hombre que corría tras el viento
overview: Daniel works at an insurance company in the city center. He spends much of his time staring out a large window behind his desk. One more boring morning, he sees a beautiful woman pass by his window, the sweet Carola, and he falls madly in love with her. Love at first sight. From then on, Daniel will try to win her over again, but the inability to express what he feels will jeopardize his goal, although perhaps fate will give him the chance, once and for all, to take control of his future.
